info.title: Specter Admin API - Dashboard & Management
info.description:
Specter Admin API

Administrative API for managing your Specter gaming backend. Use this API to configure games, items, achievements, economy, and other backend features through the dashboard or programmatically.

Key Management Areas

  • Games & Apps - Configure game settings, environments
  • Items & Economy - Create currencies, items, bundles, stores
  • Achievements - Define tasks, missions, rewards
  • Players - Manage player data, segments, analytics
  • LiveOps - Schedule events, campaigns, content updates
  • Competitions - Set up leaderboards, tournaments

Authentication

Admin API calls require:

  • Bearer Token - Admin user authentication token
  • Api-Key header - Project API key (for some endpoints)

Resources

  • 📥 OpenAPI JSON Spec
  • 🌐 Website
